scenario: You are designing a solution for a sales organization. You need to ensure that the solution meets the requirements of the organization with minimal customization.
q: Which components should you use? Match the appropriate component to each requirement. Each component may be used once, more than once, or not at all.
rows: Send a thank-you email to a customer when a sale is closed.
Ensure that a quote is checked and validated before it is sent to the customer.
Display an error message or a recommendation when the wrong input is entered.
why: To automatically send a thank-you email when a sale is closed, use a WORKFLOW triggered when the sales record status is set to closed. To ensure a quote is checked and validated before it is sent, use a BUSINESS PROCESS FLOW, which guides users through the correct steps/stages. To display an error message or a recommendation when wrong input is entered, use a BUSINESS RULE - it provides a no-code UI to validate input, hide/show fields, set/clear values, and show error messages/recommendations. Plug-in and JavaScript are not needed: all three requirements are achievable with Dataverse out-of-the-box (OOTB) features, so writing C#/JS code would be unnecessary customization.
